title: skills.json
description: Project manifest for the `skills` CLI (schema v2). Unknown top-level keys are fatal.

target.description: Directory (relative to the project root) skills are synced into.

aliases.description: Additional link locations mirroring the target (symlink on POSIX, junction on Windows). Must be unique and must not equal the target.

lock-file.description: Lockfile location (relative to the project root). Must stay inside the project root and must not equal the target, an alias or skills.json itself.

dependencies.description: Per-package-manager configuration: how each manager's installed dependency tree becomes a skill donor, plus its per-manager trust list. composer is enabled by default; npm and go are reserved and disabled until their providers land. Each entry is a boolean toggle (true = { enabled: true }) or a configuration object.

composer.description: Composer dependencies (enabled by default). 'trusted' items use the 'vendor/package' or 'vendor/*' grammar.

npm.description: npm dependencies (reserved; disabled until the npm provider lands). Target 'trusted' grammar: bare package ('lodash'), scoped package ('@scope/pkg') or scope wildcard ('@scope/*').

go.description: Go modules (reserved; disabled until the go provider lands). Target 'trusted' grammar: module path prefixes ('github.com/owner/mod', 'github.com/owner/*').

sources.description: Explicit donor sources: by-package (github/gitlab), by-url (http/zip) or a local directory (dir).

remote.description: Renamed to sources; read as a deprecated alias.

mode.description: off = audit stage skipped; warn = blocking findings render as warnings; block = any blocking finding aborts the sync (exit 3).

pipeline.description: Ordered auditor chain. Absent = a single 'static' entry; [] = no auditors. 'llm' and 'http' are reserved for a future release.

on-fail.description: Caps this auditor's effective severity: warn downgrades blocks, block upgrades warnings.

path-from-root.description: Monorepo re-anchor: relative path with plain segments only (no '.'/'..').

dependencyManagerConfig.description: Per-manager configuration object (npm/go). 'trusted' items are validated structurally only (non-empty, unique) until the manager's provider lands.

enabled.description: Walk this manager's installed tree for donors. Absent = the per-manager default (composer true; npm/go false). Configuring 'trusted' does not implicitly enable the manager.

trusted.description: Per-manager trust patterns. Extends the built-in per-manager list and direct-dependency trust; 'trusted-replace' replaces both.

trusted-replace.description: When true, this manager's 'trusted' list fully replaces its built-in list AND its direct-dependency implicit trust.

composerDependencyConfig.description: Composer per-manager configuration object. 'trusted' items use the 'vendor/package' or 'vendor/*' grammar.

enabled.description: Walk the composer dependency tree for donors (default: true). Configuring 'trusted' does not implicitly enable the manager.

trusted.description: Composer trust patterns: 'vendor/package' or 'vendor/*'. Extends the built-in list and direct-dependency trust; 'trusted-replace' replaces both.

trusted-replace.description: When true, the composer 'trusted' list fully replaces the built-in list AND direct-dependency implicit trust.

sourceByPackage.description: Donor source entry for name-based adapters (github, gitlab).

host.description: Self-hosted instance (GitHub Enterprise, self-hosted GitLab). Absent = the public host.

ref.description: Version pin: tag, branch or commit SHA. Absent = latest stable tag, falling back to the default branch HEAD.

skills.description: Tri-state: absent/null = all skills; [] = donor registered, pulls nothing; non-empty = allowlist matched by canonical skill name.

sourceByUrl.description: Donor source entry for URL-based adapters (http, zip).

sha256.description: Optional integrity hash of the downloaded archive.

skills.description: Tri-state: absent/null = all skills; [] = donor registered, pulls nothing; non-empty = allowlist matched by canonical skill name.

sourceByDir.description: Donor source entry for the path-based adapter (dir): a local directory declared as an explicit donor.

path.description: Directory path. Relative paths resolve from the project root; absolute paths (including Windows drive letters) are honoured, and locations outside the project are allowed — a sources entry is an explicit act of trust and syncing only reads from it. The path must not be the project root and must not overlap the sync target or an alias.

skills.description: Tri-state: absent/null = all skills; [] = donor registered, pulls nothing; non-empty = allowlist matched by canonical skill name.
